description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bins that runs on push to the master branch, excluding changes to docs, README.md, and NEWS.md. The workflow can also be triggered by a workflow call with optional inputs for lnav_version_number and upload_url. It has two jobs, build-musl and build-macos, that run on ubuntu-latest and macos-12 respectively, and build and upload lnav packages for musl and macOS.
